TokeniserState.java

1 
package org.jsoup.parser;
2
3 
import org.jsoup.nodes.DocumentType;
4
5 
/**
6 
 * States and transition activations for the Tokeniser.
7 
 */
8 
enum TokeniserState {
9 
    Data {
10 
        // in data state, gather characters until a character reference or tag is found
11 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
12 
            switch (r.current()) {
13 
                case '&':
14 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::advanceTransition → TIMED_OUT
 
                    t.advanceTransition(CharacterReferenceInData);
15 
                    break;
16 
                case '<':
17 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::advanceTransition → TIMED_OUT
 
                    t.advanceTransition(TagOpen);
18 
                    break;
19 
                case nullChar:
20 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::error → SURVIVED
 
                    t.error(this); // NOT replacement character (oddly?)
21 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
                    t.emit(r.consume());
22 
                    break;
23 
                case eof:
24 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → TIMED_OUT
 
                    t.emit(new Token.EOF());
25 
                    break;
26 
                default:
27 
                    String data = r.consumeData();
28 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
                    t.emit(data);
29 
                    break;
30 
            }
31 
        }
32 
    },
33 
    CharacterReferenceInData {
34 
        // from & in data
35 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
36 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/TokeniserState::access$100 → TIMED_OUT
 
            readCharRef(t, Data);
37 
        }
38 
    },
39 
    Rcdata {
40 
        /// handles data in title, textarea etc
41 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
42 
            switch (r.current()) {
43 
                case '&':
44 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::advanceTransition → TIMED_OUT
 
                    t.advanceTransition(CharacterReferenceInRcdata);
45 
                    break;
46 
                case '<':
47 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::advanceTransition → TIMED_OUT
 
                    t.advanceTransition(RcdataLessthanSign);
48 
                    break;
49 
                case nullChar:
50 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::error → SURVIVED
 
                    t.error(this);
51 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/CharacterReader::advance → KILLED
 
                    r.advance();
52 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
                    t.emit(replacementChar);
53 
                    break;
54 
                case eof:
55 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → TIMED_OUT
 
                    t.emit(new Token.EOF());
56 
                    break;
57 
                default:
58 
                    String data = r.consumeData();
59 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
                    t.emit(data);
60 
                    break;
61 
            }
62 
        }
63 
    },
64 
    CharacterReferenceInRcdata {
65 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
66 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/TokeniserState::access$100 → TIMED_OUT
 
            readCharRef(t, Rcdata);
67 
        }
68 
    },
69 
    Rawtext {
70 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
71 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/TokeniserState::access$200 → TIMED_OUT
 
            readRawData(t, r, this, RawtextLessthanSign);
72 
        }
73 
    },
74 
    ScriptData {
75 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
76 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/TokeniserState::access$200 → TIMED_OUT
 
            readRawData(t, r, this, ScriptDataLessthanSign);
77 
        }
78 
    },
79 
    PLAINTEXT {
80 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
81 
            switch (r.current()) {
82 
                case nullChar:
83 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::error → SURVIVED
 
                    t.error(this);
84 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/CharacterReader::advance → KILLED
 
                    r.advance();
85 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
                    t.emit(replacementChar);
86 
                    break;
87 
                case eof:
88 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → TIMED_OUT
 
                    t.emit(new Token.EOF());
89 
                    break;
90 
                default:
91 
                    String data = r.consumeTo(nullChar);
92 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
                    t.emit(data);
93 
                    break;
94 
            }
95 
        }
96 
    },
97 
    TagOpen {
98 
        // from < in data
99 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
100 
            switch (r.current()) {
101 
                case '!':
102 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::advanceTransition → TIMED_OUT
 
                    t.advanceTransition(MarkupDeclarationOpen);
103 
                    break;
104 
                case '/':
105 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::advanceTransition → TIMED_OUT
 
                    t.advanceTransition(EndTagOpen);
106 
                    break;
107 
                case '?':
108 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::createBogusCommentPending → KILLED
 
                    t.createBogusCommentPending();
109 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → TIMED_OUT
 
                    t.transition(BogusComment);
110 
                    break;
111 
                default:
112 2 1. read : negated conditional → KILLED
2. read : removed conditional - replaced equality check with false → KILLED
 
                    if (r.matchesAsciiAlpha()) {
113 
                        t.createTagPending(true);
114 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → TIMED_OUT
 
                        t.transition(TagName);
115 
                    } else {
116 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::error → SURVIVED
 
                        t.error(this);
117 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
                        t.emit('<'); // char that got us here
118 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → KILLED
 
                        t.transition(Data);
119 
                    }
120 
                    break;
121 
            }
122 
        }
123 
    },
124 
    EndTagOpen {
125 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
126 2 1. read : negated conditional → KILLED
2. read : removed conditional - replaced equality check with false → KILLED
 
            if (r.isEmpty()) {
127 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::eofError → SURVIVED
 
                t.eofError(this);
128 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
                t.emit("</");
129 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → KILLED
 
                t.transition(Data);
130 2 1. read : negated conditional → KILLED
2. read : removed conditional - replaced equality check with false → KILLED
 
            } else if (r.matchesAsciiAlpha()) {
131 
                t.createTagPending(false);
132 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → TIMED_OUT
 
                t.transition(TagName);
133 2 1. read : removed conditional - replaced equality check with false → SURVIVED
2. read : negated conditional → KILLED
 
            } else if (r.matches('>')) {
134 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::error → SURVIVED
 
                t.error(this);
135 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::advanceTransition → TIMED_OUT
 
                t.advanceTransition(Data);
136 
            } else {
137 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::error → SURVIVED
 
                t.error(this);
138 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::createBogusCommentPending → SURVIVED
 
                t.createBogusCommentPending();
139 
                t.commentPending.append('/'); // push the / back on that got us here
140 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → TIMED_OUT
 
                t.transition(BogusComment);
141 
            }
142 
        }
143 
    },
144 
    TagName {
145 
        // from < or </ in data, will have start or end tag pending
146 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
147 
            // previous TagOpen state did NOT consume, will have a letter char in current
148 
            String tagName = r.consumeTagName();
149 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Token$Tag::appendTagName → KILLED
 
            t.tagPending.appendTagName(tagName);
150
151 
            char c = r.consume();
152 
            switch (c) {
153 
                case '\t':
154 
                case '\n':
155 
                case '\r':
156 
                case '\f':
157 
                case ' ':
158 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → KILLED
 
                    t.transition(BeforeAttributeName);
159 
                    break;
160 
                case '/':
161 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → KILLED
 
                    t.transition(SelfClosingStartTag);
162 
                    break;
163 
                case '<': // NOTE: out of spec, but clear author intent
164 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/CharacterReader::unconsume → KILLED
 
                    r.unconsume();
165 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::error → KILLED
 
                    t.error(this);
166 
                    // intended fall through to next >
167 
                case '>':
168 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emitTagPending → KILLED
 
                    t.emitTagPending();
169 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → KILLED
 
                    t.transition(Data);
170 
                    break;
171 
                case nullChar: // replacement
172 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Token$Tag::appendTagName → NO_COVERAGE
 
                    t.tagPending.appendTagName(replacementStr);
173 
                    break;
174 
                case eof: // should emit pending tag?
175 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::eofError → KILLED
 
                    t.eofError(this);
176 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → TIMED_OUT
 
                    t.transition(Data);
177 
                    break;
178 
                default: // buffer underrun
179 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Token$Tag::appendTagName → KILLED
 
                    t.tagPending.appendTagName(c);
180 
            }
181 
        }
182 
    },
183 
    RcdataLessthanSign {
184 
        // from < in rcdata
185 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
186 2 1. read : negated conditional → KILLED
2. read : removed conditional - replaced equality check with false → KILLED
 
            if (r.matches('/')) {
187 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::createTempBuffer → KILLED
 
                t.createTempBuffer();
188 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::advanceTransition → TIMED_OUT
 
                t.advanceTransition(RCDATAEndTagOpen);
189 8 1. read : negated conditional → KILLED
2. read : negated conditional → KILLED
3. read : negated conditional → KILLED
4. read : negated conditional → KILLED
5. read : removed conditional - replaced equality check with false → KILLED
6. read : removed conditional - replaced equality check with false → KILLED
7. read : removed conditional - replaced equality check with false → KILLED
8. read : removed conditional - replaced equality check with false → KILLED
 
            } else if (r.readFully() && r.matchesAsciiAlpha() && t.appropriateEndTagName() != null &&  !r.containsIgnoreCase(t.appropriateEndTagSeq())) {
190 
                // diverge from spec: got a start tag, but there's no appropriate end tag (</title>), so rather than
191 
                // consuming to EOF; break out here
192 
                t.tagPending = t.createTagPending(false).name(t.appropriateEndTagName());
193 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emitTagPending → KILLED
 
                t.emitTagPending();
194 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → TIMED_OUT
 
                t.transition(TagOpen); // straight into TagOpen, as we came from < and looks like we're on a start tag
195 
            } else {
196 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
                t.emit("<");
197 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → KILLED
 
                t.transition(Rcdata);
198 
            }
199 
        }
200 
    },
201 
    RCDATAEndTagOpen {
202 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
203 2 1. read : negated conditional → KILLED
2. read : removed conditional - replaced equality check with false → KILLED
 
            if (r.matchesAsciiAlpha()) {
204 
                t.createTagPending(false);
205 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Token$Tag::appendTagName → KILLED
 
                t.tagPending.appendTagName(r.current());
206 
                t.dataBuffer.append(r.current());
207 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::advanceTransition → KILLED
 
                t.advanceTransition(RCDATAEndTagName);
208 
            } else {
209 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
                t.emit("</");
210 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → KILLED
 
                t.transition(Rcdata);
211 
            }
212 
        }
213 
    },
214 
    RCDATAEndTagName {
215 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
216 2 1. read : negated conditional → KILLED
2. read : removed conditional - replaced equality check with false → KILLED
 
            if (r.matchesAsciiAlpha()) {
217 
                String name = r.consumeLetterSequence();
218 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Token$Tag::appendTagName → KILLED
 
                t.tagPending.appendTagName(name);
219 
                t.dataBuffer.append(name);
220 
                return;
221 
            }
222
223 
            char c = r.consume();
224 
            switch (c) {
225 
                case '\t':
226 
                case '\n':
227 
                case '\r':
228 
                case '\f':
229 
                case ' ':
230 2 1. read : negated conditional → KILLED
2. read : removed conditional - replaced equality check with false → KILLED
 
                    if (t.isAppropriateEndTagToken())
231 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → SURVIVED
 
                        t.transition(BeforeAttributeName);
232 
                    else
233 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/TokeniserState$13::anythingElse → NO_COVERAGE
 
                        anythingElse(t, r);
234 
                    break;
235 
                case '/':
236 2 1. read : negated conditional → NO_COVERAGE
2. read : removed conditional - replaced equality check with false → NO_COVERAGE
 
                    if (t.isAppropriateEndTagToken())
237 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → NO_COVERAGE
 
                        t.transition(SelfClosingStartTag);
238 
                    else
239 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/TokeniserState$13::anythingElse → NO_COVERAGE
 
                        anythingElse(t, r);
240 
                    break;
241 
                case '>':
242 2 1. read : negated conditional → KILLED
2. read : removed conditional - replaced equality check with false → KILLED
 
                    if (t.isAppropriateEndTagToken()) {
243 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emitTagPending → KILLED
 
                        t.emitTagPending();
244 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → KILLED
 
                        t.transition(Data);
245 
                    }
246 
                    else
247 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/TokeniserState$13::anythingElse → KILLED
 
                        anythingElse(t, r);
248 
                    break;
249 
                default:
250 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/TokeniserState$13::anythingElse → KILLED
 
                    anythingElse(t, r);
251 
            }
252 
        }
253
254 
        private void anythingElse(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
255 1 1. anythingElse : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
            t.emit("</");
256 1 1. anythingElse : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
            t.emit(t.dataBuffer);
257 1 1. anythingElse : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/CharacterReader::unconsume → KILLED
 
            r.unconsume();
258 1 1. anythingElse : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → KILLED
 
            t.transition(Rcdata);
259 
        }
260 
    },
261 
    RawtextLessthanSign {
262 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
263 2 1. read : negated conditional → KILLED
2. read : removed conditional - replaced equality check with false → KILLED
 
            if (r.matches('/')) {
264 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::createTempBuffer → SURVIVED
 
                t.createTempBuffer();
265 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::advanceTransition → TIMED_OUT
 
                t.advanceTransition(RawtextEndTagOpen);
266 
            } else {
267 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
                t.emit('<');
268 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → KILLED
 
                t.transition(Rawtext);
269 
            }
270 
        }
271 
    },
272 
    RawtextEndTagOpen {
273 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
274 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/TokeniserState::access$400 → TIMED_OUT
 
            readEndTag(t, r, RawtextEndTagName, Rawtext);
275 
        }
276 
    },
277 
    RawtextEndTagName {
278 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
279 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/TokeniserState::access$500 → TIMED_OUT
 
            handleDataEndTag(t, r, Rawtext);
280 
        }
281 
    },
282 
    ScriptDataLessthanSign {
283 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
284 
            switch (r.consume()) {
285 
                case '/':
286 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::createTempBuffer → SURVIVED
 
                    t.createTempBuffer();
287 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → KILLED
 
                    t.transition(ScriptDataEndTagOpen);
288 
                    break;
289 
                case '!':
290 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
                    t.emit("<!");
291 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → KILLED
 
                    t.transition(ScriptDataEscapeStart);
292 
                    break;
293 
                case eof:
294 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
                    t.emit("<");
295 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::eofError → SURVIVED
 
                    t.eofError(this);
296 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → KILLED
 
                    t.transition(Data);
297 
                    break;
298 
                default:
299 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
                    t.emit("<");
300 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/CharacterReader::unconsume → KILLED
 
                    r.unconsume();
301 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → KILLED
 
                    t.transition(ScriptData);
302 
            }
303 
        }
304 
    },
305 
    ScriptDataEndTagOpen {
306 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
307 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/TokeniserState::access$400 → TIMED_OUT
 
            readEndTag(t, r, ScriptDataEndTagName, ScriptData);
308 
        }
309 
    },
310 
    ScriptDataEndTagName {
311 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
312 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/TokeniserState::access$500 → TIMED_OUT
 
            handleDataEndTag(t, r, ScriptData);
313 
        }
314 
    },
315 
    ScriptDataEscapeStart {
316 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
317 2 1. read : negated conditional → KILLED
2. read : removed conditional - replaced equality check with false → KILLED
 
            if (r.matches('-')) {
318 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
                t.emit('-');
319 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::advanceTransition → KILLED
 
                t.advanceTransition(ScriptDataEscapeStartDash);
320 
            } else {
321 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → TIMED_OUT
 
                t.transition(ScriptData);
322 
            }
323 
        }
324 
    },
325 
    ScriptDataEscapeStartDash {
326 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
327 2 1. read : negated conditional → KILLED
2. read : removed conditional - replaced equality check with false → KILLED
 
            if (r.matches('-')) {
328 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
                t.emit('-');
329 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::advanceTransition → KILLED
 
                t.advanceTransition(ScriptDataEscapedDashDash);
330 
            } else {
331 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → NO_COVERAGE
 
                t.transition(ScriptData);
332 
            }
333 
        }
334 
    },
335 
    ScriptDataEscaped {
336 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
337 2 1. read : removed conditional - replaced equality check with false → SURVIVED
2. read : negated conditional → KILLED
 
            if (r.isEmpty()) {
338 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::eofError → NO_COVERAGE
 
                t.eofError(this);
339 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → NO_COVERAGE
 
                t.transition(Data);
340 
                return;
341 
            }
342
343 
            switch (r.current()) {
344 
                case '-':
345 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
                    t.emit('-');
346 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::advanceTransition → KILLED
 
                    t.advanceTransition(ScriptDataEscapedDash);
347 
                    break;
348 
                case '<':
349 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::advanceTransition → TIMED_OUT
 
                    t.advanceTransition(ScriptDataEscapedLessthanSign);
350 
                    break;
351 
                case nullChar:
352 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::error → NO_COVERAGE
 
                    t.error(this);
353 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/CharacterReader::advance → NO_COVERAGE
 
                    r.advance();
354 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → NO_COVERAGE
 
                    t.emit(replacementChar);
355 
                    break;
356 
                default:
357 
                    String data = r.consumeToAny('-', '<', nullChar);
358 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
                    t.emit(data);
359 
            }
360 
        }
361 
    },
362 
    ScriptDataEscapedDash {
363 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
364 2 1. read : negated conditional → SURVIVED
2. read : removed conditional - replaced equality check with false → SURVIVED
 
            if (r.isEmpty()) {
365 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::eofError → NO_COVERAGE
 
                t.eofError(this);
366 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → NO_COVERAGE
 
                t.transition(Data);
367 
                return;
368 
            }
369
370 
            char c = r.consume();
371 
            switch (c) {
372 
                case '-':
373 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → KILLED
 
                    t.emit(c);
374 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → SURVIVED
 
                    t.transition(ScriptDataEscapedDashDash);
375 
                    break;
376 
                case '<':
377 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → NO_COVERAGE
 
                    t.transition(ScriptDataEscapedLessthanSign);
378 
                    break;
379 
                case nullChar:
380 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::error → NO_COVERAGE
 
                    t.error(this);
381 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → NO_COVERAGE
 
                    t.emit(replacementChar);
382 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → NO_COVERAGE
 
                    t.transition(ScriptDataEscaped);
383 
                    break;
384 
                default:
385 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emit → NO_COVERAGE
 
                    t.emit(c);
386 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → NO_COVERAGE
 
                    t.transition(ScriptDataEscaped);
387 
            }
388 
        }
389 
    },
390 
    ScriptDataEscapedDashDash {
391

803 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Token$Tag::appendAttributeValue → NO_COVERAGE

    BogusComment {
916 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
917

918

919 
            // todo: replace nullChar with replaceChar
920 
            char next = r.current();
921 4 1. read : negated conditional → TIMED_OUT
2. read : removed conditional - replaced equality check with false → TIMED_OUT
3. read : negated conditional → KILLED
4. read : removed conditional - replaced equality check with false → KILLED

922 
                r.consume();
923 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::emitCommentPending → KILLED
 
                t.emitCommentPending();
924 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → MEMORY_ERROR

925 
            }
926 
        }

        }

    },

1083

1091

1092 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::error → NO_COVERAGE

1093 
                    t.commentPending.append("--!").append(replacementChar);
1094 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → NO_COVERAGE
 
                    t.transition(Comment);
1095 
                    break;
1096

1109

1111 
                case '\t':
1112

1113

1114

1115

1127

1128

1130 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → NO_COVERAGE

1131 
            }
1132 
        }

    BeforeDoctypeName {
1135 
        @Override void read(Tokeniser t, CharacterReader r) {
1136 2 1. read : negated conditional → SURVIVED
2. read : removed conditional - replaced equality check with false → SURVIVED
 
            if (r.matchesAsciiAlpha()) {
1137 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::createDoctypePending → SURVIVED
 
                t.createDoctypePending();
1138 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::transition → TIMED_OUT
 
                t.transition(DoctypeName);
1139 
                return;
1140 
            }
1141 
            char c = r.consume();
1142 
            switch (c) {
1143 
                case '\t':
1144 
                case '\n':
1145 
                case '\r':
1146 
                case '\f':
1147 
                case ' ':
1148 
                    break; // ignore whitespace
1149 
                case nullChar:
1150 1 1. read : removed call to org/jsoup/parser/Tokeniser::error → SURVIVED
